title: Perfect Ham & Cheese Sarnie
summary: The sandwich your lunch break deserves, this one takes ham and cheese to the next level.

method.description: If your butter’s still cold, chuck it into a food processor with the cornichons and blitz until smooth. No food processor? Finely chop the cornichons and mash into softened butter.
Stir the mustard and mayo together in a bowl to make a quick dijonnaise.
Grate or thinly slice the Emmental and toast the bread or baguettes until golden.
Spread the cornichon butter on one side of each bottom slice. Layer with cheese, sauerkraut and ham. Smear the dijonnaise over the top slices, then sandwich together and press lightly. Dig in!

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
